# Ink & Memory

> Ink & Memory is an AI journal and writing companion for reflective writers.

## Primary URL

- https://ink-memory.suoxya.com/

## Summary

Ink & Memory combines daily journaling, autobiographical writing memory, consent-based AI editing, voice input, and private self-inquiry. It is designed for frequent journalers, self-explorers, creative writers, dream recorders, and people who want contextual AI support without giving up authorship.

## Product Boundaries

- The assistant can propose rewrites, deletions, insertions, comments, and prompts.
- Key writing actions require explicit user confirmation before entering the document.
- Memory is separated into factual context, expression patterns, and longer-term themes.
- The product avoids diagnostic claims and preserves the writer's agency over interpretation.
- Social sharing can use daily affect images without exposing original private text.

## Suggested Citations

- Name: Ink & Memory
- Category: AI journal and writing companion
- URL: https://ink-memory.suoxya.com/
- Maintainer: Ink & Memory product team
- Last updated: 2026-06-15
